title: anthemis tinctoria var. subtinctoria
intro: Anthemis tinctoria var. subtinctoria, also known as blue chamomile, is a variety of the chamomile plant, characterized by its blue-colored flowers. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of blue chamomile include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Blue chamomile can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, essential oils, and salves, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
